titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Sterling Memorial Library, Yale University, Photographs of Windows
Sterling Memorial Library, Yale University, Photographs of Windows
titlestmt.author: compiled by Christine Connolly

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday January 9, 2019 at 10:44
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: Sterling Memorial Library, Yale University, photographs of windows
did.abstract: The materials consist of photographs documenting the decorative windows in the Sterling Memorial Library at Yale, with an emphasis on the main reading room and the stack tower.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-B (YRG 46-B), Records and materials documenting individual Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Sterling Memorial Library, Yale University, Photographs of Windows (RU 392). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of photographs documenting the decorative windows in the Sterling Memorial Library at Yale, with an emphasis on the main reading room and the stack tower.
